title: aciotis ferruginea
intro: Aciotis ferruginea, also known as the rusty aciotis, is a plant species native to South America, characterized by its woody stem and hairy leaves. The medicinal properties of Aciotis ferruginea include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include the treatment of fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The herbal preparations of Aciotis ferruginea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
